message:
test(grpc): add integration tests for F.1, F.2, F.3, and cross-feature

- Reflection: register/list/describe/unknown service
- Compression: identity/gzip roundtrip, size reduction, encoding resolution
- gRPC-web: content type matrix, trailer status codes, binary metadata,
  multi-message stream, text/binary equivalence, empty messages
- Cross-feature: gzip+web, text mode+gzip, codec frame compatibility,
  server config compression, max size enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
